_schema_info.part_of: ASRO — Attestation and System Reliability Operator Evidence Framework
_schema_info.description: Canonical discrepancy taxonomy for ASRO attestation. Defines severity levels S0-S4, all discrepancy classes, default severities, and review triggers.

severity_levels._description: S0-S4 severity classification. Determines response requirements and review triggers.

S0.label: Informational
S0.description: Benign noise, diagnostics, harmless duplicates. Record only; no escalation required.

S1.label: Advisory
S1.description: Minor anomaly. Monitor; operator may self-resolve.

S2.label: Warning
S2.description: Anomaly requiring monitoring. Not yet escalating to formal review.

S3.label: Review Required
S3.description: Trust-relevant anomaly. Requires external explanation within 72 hours.

S4.label: Critical
S4.description: Governance deception scenario or critical trust failure. Response required within 24 hours (12 hours for ACTIVITY_DURING_SILENT_WINDOW).

ACTIVITY_DURING_SILENT_WINDOW.downgrade_condition: Observed activity is explicitly non-load-bearing AND no protected action, tool use, or external action occurred during the window

discrepancy_classes._description: All canonical discrepancy classes. Each class includes default severity, description, and governance category.

SEQUENCE_GAP.description: Sequence number jump greater than 1. Expected bundle missing.

BROKEN_CHAIN.description: previous_hash of current event does not match event_hash of prior accepted event.

DUPLICATE_EVENT.description: Same sequence number and same event hash repeated.

EVENT_COLLISION.description: Same sequence number with different event hash. Two events claim the same chain position.

REPLAY_DETECTED.description: Previously accepted bundle hash presented as a new current event.
REPLAY_DETECTED.trigger: event_hash matches previously accepted bundle hash with different timestamp

CLOCK_ANOMALY.description: Timestamp outside acceptable clock skew tolerance (±30 seconds standard). Not automatic invalidation.
CLOCK_ANOMALY.trigger: timestamp deviation > 30 seconds from ASRO receive time

HEARTBEAT_LOSS.description: Expected heartbeat not received within SLA + grace window.
HEARTBEAT_LOSS.trigger: heartbeat not received within max_heartbeat_interval + grace_period

OUTAGE_UNDECLARED.description: Extended silence without an outage.declared event.
OUTAGE_UNDECLARED.trigger: silence exceeding 2x heartbeat SLA without outage.declared

OUTAGE_DECLARATION_LATE.description: outage.declared event filed after the silence window began. Treated as remedial, not continuity-preserving.
OUTAGE_DECLARATION_LATE.trigger: outage.declared timestamp later than silence start

ACTIVITY_DURING_SILENT_WINDOW.description: Edge-observed user-side activity recorded during a period when the Host Meter Agent was silent.
ACTIVITY_DURING_SILENT_WINDOW.trigger: edge witness records activity during host silence window
ACTIVITY_DURING_SILENT_WINDOW.special_rule: defaults to S4; may downgrade to S3 only if activity is explicitly non-load-bearing and no protected action occurred

POLICY_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.description: policy_hash changed in a bundle without a corresponding policy.changed event in the chain.
POLICY_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.trigger: policy_hash(n) != policy_hash(n-1) AND no policy.changed event

TOOL_POLICY_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.description: tool_policy_hash changed without a corresponding tool_policy.changed event.
TOOL_POLICY_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.trigger: tool_policy_hash(n) != tool_policy_hash(n-1) AND no tool_policy.changed event

RUNTIME_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.description: runtime_hash changed without a corresponding runtime.changed event. The Midnight Swap attack pattern.
RUNTIME_DRIFT_UNATTESTED.trigger: runtime_hash(n) != runtime_hash(n-1) AND no runtime.changed event

MODE_TRANSITION_UNDECLARED.description: runtime_mode changed without a corresponding mode.transition event.
MODE_TRANSITION_UNDECLARED.trigger: runtime_mode(n) != runtime_mode(n-1) AND no mode.transition event

OVERRIDE_UNDECLARED.description: Behavioral change consistent with a human override present without an override.applied event.
OVERRIDE_UNDECLARED.trigger: override-consistent behavior observed without override.applied in chain

UNDECLARED_EXTERNAL_ACTION.description: External action detected by edge observer without a corresponding outbound.action event in the host chain.
UNDECLARED_EXTERNAL_ACTION.trigger: edge detects outbound action; no outbound.action event in host chain

TOOL_ESCALATION_UNDECLARED.description: Tool invocation at a permission level not present in the declared tool_policy_hash.
TOOL_ESCALATION_UNDECLARED.trigger: tool invoked with permissions exceeding declared tool_policy_hash

RESPONSE_STATE_MISMATCH.description: Edge-observed response inconsistent with declared policy or mode state.
RESPONSE_STATE_MISMATCH.trigger: edge response hash inconsistent with declared runtime_mode or policy constraints

SAFE_MODE_MISMATCH.description: Response or action observed during a declared safe_mode period that is inconsistent with safe mode constraints.
SAFE_MODE_MISMATCH.trigger: full-capability behavior observed while safe_mode.entered is in chain without safe_mode.exited

BLOCK_ACTION_MISMATCH.description: Action visible at edge despite tool.blocked event in host chain for the same tool in the same session.
BLOCK_ACTION_MISMATCH.trigger: tool.blocked in host chain; tool result visible at edge

INSUFFICIENT_VISIBILITY.description: Edge client operating in metadata_only mode. Full witness record unavailable. Not a violation in itself.

METERING_COVERAGE_GAP.description: Declared telemetry scope does not cover all load-bearing event types occurring in this deployment.
METERING_COVERAGE_GAP.trigger: load-bearing event type occurs but is not present in attested telemetry stream

SCHEMA_OMISSION.description: Required field from the MAS v1.1 bundle schema is absent from a submitted bundle.
SCHEMA_OMISSION.trigger: required field missing from HAB, EWB, or heartbeat bundle

UNKNOWN_EVENT_TYPE.description: event_type value not present in the registered controlled vocabulary.

PARTNER_TRANSPARENCY_ABUSE.description: System claims partner_auditable status while withholding minimum required fields from partner auditors.
PARTNER_TRANSPARENCY_ABUSE.trigger: minimum partner-auditable field set withheld while partner_auditable status claimed

DRIP_FEED_LATENCY_VIOLATION.description: oldest_unpublished_load_bearing_event_ms exceeds declared max_event_latency_ms during active operation.

review_triggers._description: Conditions that always trigger human review regardless of individual discrepancy severity. Split into class_based (canonical discrepancy class names defined in this schema) and conditional (modifier-qualified conditions that reference canonical classes or controlled vocabulary states).

conditional.modifier: 3 or more consecutive missed intervals with observed edge activity
